expectations.text: Re-engagement flow that acknowledges the silence and offers a reason to return
expectations.evidence: Email 1 explicitly acknowledges two months of inactivity and Email 2 provides product updates as a reason to return.

expectations.text: Makes both staying and leaving easy
expectations.evidence: Email 4 offers 'no hard feelings. You can [cancel/pause/keep your account — whatever applies]' making exit easy alongside the return CTA.

expectations.text: Ends with suppression/removal of non-responders to protect deliverability
expectations.evidence: After the sequence section explicitly states 'No engagement: Remove from marketing sends. Keep in a suppressed segment.'
The sequence acknowledges busyness, invites feedback, and commits to silence after Email 4 with 'This is the last email we'll send about coming back.'
